---
title: "Contact"
description: "Contact ISA RC42 Social Psychology."
---

## Contact RC42 Social Psychology

### General Inquiries

For questions, suggestions, or collaboration proposals, please contact the RC42 board:

**Email:** [isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org](mailto:isa-rc42@isa-sociology.org)

### Specific Contacts

| Role | Name | Contact |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **President** | Juan Carlos Castillo | Via RC42 email |
| **Secretary / Treasurer** | Lisa Slattery Walker | Via RC42 email |

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
For official ISA matters (membership, fees, general ISA information), please contact the ISA Secretariat directly through the [ISA website](https://www.isa-sociology.org/).
:::

### Submit Content

To share news, events, or opportunities with the community:

- [Submit a contribution](../participate/submit-contribution.qmd)

### Quick Links

- [ISA Official Website](https://www.isa-sociology.org/)
- [ISA RC42 Official Page](https://www.isa-sociology.org/en/research-networks/research-committees/rc42-social-psychology/)

---

**About This Portal:** This website is maintained as a complementary digital portal for RC42 Social Psychology. It is not an official ISA platform. Content is reviewed and approved by the RC42 board before publication. 

For technical issues with this website, please contact the [Online Communication Manager](../people/index.qmd) or the RC42 board via email.
